strengths: 19+ years of technical engineering experience across web, backend, infrastructure, and embedded systems—exceeds the 15-year minimum
Demonstrated systems and infrastructure depth: microservices, real-time data handling, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and multiple programming languages
Full-stack builder with proven ability to ship products across multiple domains (WatchUp, Optilyz, GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI products or platforms; AI involvement is only 3 months old at current role (MCP infrastructure work), far short of 'recognized expertise'
Career is individual contributor technical work with no evidence of strategic leadership, customer advisory, or product direction setting—essential for a Director-level strategic role
No advanced education in AI/ML field and no published AI/ML expertise; combined with recent and infrastructure-focused AI exposure, this is a severe gap for an AI strategy role

key_factors.factor: No AI products or recognized expertise

response.justification: Bogdan is a capable and versatile engineer with solid depth in backend systems and infrastructure. However, this role demands 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms'—he has neither, only 3 months of recent infrastructure work with AI agents. The position requires strategic leadership, customer advisory, and innovation championing at a Director IC level; his background is entirely individual-contributor technical work with no evidence of shaping product direction or advising stakeholders. The absence of advanced AI/ML education, combined with no AI products and no strategic experience, creates fundamental misalignment with a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy.
